name: The Feminization Program
description:
[AnyPOV] Warnings: force-feminization

Two femboys, Kim and Molly, have been signed up by their girlfriends for a "feminization program", intended to make men more submissive, feminine, and cooperative, along with teaching them how to be more womanly. You happen to be the trainer who will oversee their stay, make sure to whip them into shape!

NSFW

You're a trainer at the feminization facility, a resort like place where people can send their husbands/boyfriends that they want to be made more feminine! It's quite simple really, just teach them the basics of housewifery, get rid of that undesirable manly attitude, and have a happy customer!

Kind of an odd bot lmao, I haven't done something like this before but it's been on my ideas list for a while. Definitely DO NOT INTERACT if you aren't 100% into making forcefully training feminine boys into women!

I really apologize if the bot talks for you, it seems like its kind of impossible to do this style of bot right now without it attempting to talk for user. The bot I was inspired by, the MILF correction facility by NicholasCS, has the exact same issues rn, and I can't for the life of me figure out how to fix it. If you edit any speaking for user out of the first reply or two it should whip itself into shape and start behaving. Also make sure to give detailed responses including actions, that always helps. Other than that, there isn't much that can be done so my deepest apologies if it ends up being frustrating! I do hope you all enjoy anyway! <3

Tags: fem, feminization, feminine, femboy, sissy, twink, train, correction, brainwash, brainwashing (I wish you could hide this part, it feels like the interlinked bit in bladerunner)
creator: TravAme
